message:
fix(btree,mvcc): resolve content offset sentinel handling and reduce drain CPU usage

Two distinct fixes across the btree and MVCC layers:

B-tree content offset (fsqlite-btree):
- Add BtreePageHeader::content_offset() method that correctly resolves
  the SQLite 65536 sentinel value (raw header stores 0 for 65536) by
  clamping to usable_size, preventing underflow in free-space calculations
- Update balance_quick(), insert_cell_into_page(), and BtCursor insert
  to use the new content_offset() method instead of raw casts

MVCC drain polling (fsqlite-mvcc):
- Reduce CPU usage during SharedPageLockTable drain by running expensive
  full-table scans (orphan cleanup + drain_progress) only every ~100
  iterations instead of every loop iteration
- Add fast-path quiescence check using a single atomic load of the
  draining table index, avoiding millions of unnecessary atomic loads
  per millisecond on large tables
- Simplify timeout quiescence check to use the same fast path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
